title: DawgCraft Curated Experience
description: A collection of curated mods for the DawgCraft server community. Includes mod replacements for Optifine and Simple Voice Chat!
body:
This is a collection of curated mods for the DawgCraft server community. Includes mod replacements for Optifine and Simple Voice Chat! As of 3.0.0, this pack is technically unofficial but will continue to be maintained with each server update for the people who use it.

Disclaimer: this is a client-focused modpack, you do not need any of these mods to play on the server. It is designed to improve the player experience through having access to many of Optifine's features such as zoom, shaders, and will allow you to use voice chat with other players and see beyond the server's 8-chunk render distance.

There is no need to add the server's IP, it is included with the modpack. We also have some shaders pre-loaded for the players who can run them.

We will update this modpack when included shaders or mods are updated and on community request.

Happy Crafting!
